_description: Registry of documented false-positive CVEs for the OWASP dependency-check gate. Each entry represents a CVE that the NVD reports but that we have verified to be a false positive. Suppressions are applied only when a consumer repo explicitly opts in via the NOVA_OWASP_CVE_SUPPRESSIONS env var (or workflow input) and lists the CVE ID. The reusable workflow nova-devops/.github/workflows/reusable-owasp-check.yml fetches this file, filters to the requested CVEs, and generates a temporary suppressions.xml for that scan. Schema version 1.

suppressions.reason: NVD data accuracy: the CVE persists in 2.4.0 (latest stable as of 2026-07-13). No patch version is available; waiting for upstream JetBrains fix or NVD re-curation. Reproduced in CI run 29270894390 and 29271173749 - kotlin-stdlib bumped from 2.2.21 -> 2.3.21 -> 2.4.0 and the NVD mirror still flags all three versions.
